name: Venti
description:
!NSFW!

No one expected such obstacles on the way to the treasures. You definitely don’t want to go back there again.

◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇

TW: tentacles, closed small spaces, NSFW. Be careful!

Once is enough for the rest of your life.

...Or is it? You can always start over and choose a different path, what if the outcome is different?

Update x2. "1000 tokens – best length" ©janitor

Still not sure about this bot, though...

Psst. My account is all Venti bots. There's not only smut too.
